title: Recurring Tasks recognised as one of monday.com's most installed apps for the third year in a row

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
We originally built Recurring Tasks for monday.com because we didn’t want to forget all those little tasks that matter.

Turns out, we weren’t the only ones!

We’re so excited to share that Recurring Tasks has been recognised as one of monday.com’s Most Installed Apps of 2025, marking our third consecutive year receiving this award.

A huge thank you to everyone in the monday.com community who’s supported us along the way, from sharing ideas and feedback to helping us make the app even better for all kinds of teams.

You can now find Recurring Tasks featured in the Top Apps 2025 category on the marketplace, so if you haven’t tried it yet, we’d love for you to check it out

https://auth.monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000197/recurring-tasks?utm_medium=website&utm_source=m…
